supervisor.reason: Guidance installation, fallback resolution, and prompt embedding are implemented and validated.

bootstrap.goal: Install the distributed `agents/` bundle into `~/.dormammu/agents` and let runs fall back to it with custom guidance overrides.

tasks.resume_checkpoint: All prompt-derived phase items for guidance installation and fallback are complete. Resume from optional cleanup, commit preparation, or the next user-directed scope.

items.text: Phase 1. Install the guidance bundle into `~/.dormammu/agents` during the default install flow
Phase 2. Add repeatable `--guidance-file` options so commands can use explicit rule or agent Markdown files
Phase 3. Fall back to repo guidance, installed guidance, or packaged guidance when explicit content is missing
Phase 4. Update docs and validation for prompt embedding and guidance fallback

next_action: Prepare an optional cleanup or commit for the validated guidance fallback work, or begin the next user-directed scope.
notes: Treat this file as machine truth and keep Markdown synchronized.
DASHBOARD.md should show the actual progress of the active scope.
TASKS.md should list prompt-derived development items in `[ ] Phase N. <title>` format.
The installed guidance bundle and packaged asset copy should stay synchronized.
Validation passed with `python3 -m unittest tests.test_config tests.test_state_repository tests.test_cli tests.test_install_script`.
A wheel built with `python3 -m pip wheel . --no-deps` contained the expected packaged guidance files.
